THE ARCHITECT

Most organizations lose money through broken systems, not lack of effort. I fix that by engineering infrastructure that removes bottlenecks and enforces execution clarity.

From NGO compliance systems to fintech operations and vertical SaaS products, I build the digital backbone teams can depend on when scale starts to break old workflows.

+98% QUALIFIED LEADS

AI-driven campaign system deployed across 3 growth markets.

100% DONOR COMPLIANCE

NGO data infrastructure rebuilt for reporting integrity and audit confidence.

90% ADMIN REDUCTION

ERP workflow automation deployed across operations with measurable efficiency gains.

SYSTEM CAPABILITIES

  • High-scale backend systems (Python, Node)
  • Automation pipelines for repetitive operational workflows
  • Real-time dashboards for execution visibility
  • Data infrastructure for compliance and strategic reporting

CASE STUDIES

NGO IMPACT SYSTEM

Problem: Manual donor and beneficiary tracking caused reporting delays and data loss risk.

Solution: Centralized impact platform with audit logs, role controls, and reporting workflows.

Impact: 100% compliance readiness and 10,000+ records managed with traceable integrity.

Stack: Next.js | Python | PostgreSQL

AV EVENTS INFRASTRUCTURE

Problem: Event entry and reconciliation were vulnerable to gate fraud and operational bottlenecks.

Solution: Unified ticketing core with payment rails and QR-based verification at entry points.

Impact: Gate fraud eliminated and event throughput stabilized during peak traffic.

Stack: React | Node.js | Chapa | QR Validation

AV GYM OPERATIONS CORE

Problem: High admin overhead from fragmented member operations and manual task tracking.

Solution: Vertical ERP engine for memberships, scheduling, and recurring workflow automation.

Impact: 90% of admin operations automated with cleaner execution and lower operating drag.

Stack: Next.js | Node.js | Workflow Automation

SOLUTIONS

Enterprise Systems

Build scalable internal infrastructure for organizations that cannot afford operational drift.

SaaS and Automation

Replace manual workflows with intelligent systems that scale without adding operational chaos.

Content Systems

Generate qualified demand and authority through AI-driven storytelling and execution strategy.
